case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ALLEN SEIDEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$90.50) SERVED OCT-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEIDEN, ALLEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,302.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SF/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SEIDEN, ALLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ALLEN SEIDEN--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEIDEN, ALLEN $3,302.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,392.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
